item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Roasted celeriac drizzled with browned butterand toasted seeds, served with creamy mushroom sauce, salads, homemadesourdough bread, and pickled berries. (1+6+10+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Rich smoked Indian masoor dal tadka, servedwith jeera rice topped with fresh chopped parsley. Accompanied bysalted-sweetened yogurt and lime on the side. (10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Red lentildall with plenty of ginger and intense heat from spices, served with steamedrice. Accompanied by a fresh raita of yogurt and coriander.

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Burritofyldt med bønner, søde kartofler, ost, guacamole og frisk tomatsalsa.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Vegan aromaticIndian cauliflower curry with potatoes and lentils, served with brown rice,topped with toasted coconut and fresh coriander. Accompanied by homemadeflatbread. (13+15)
